q_quant_rationale: The analysis explicitly compares observed ~7.4% lift to the ontology's expected 15-30% magnitude, noting the effect is weaker than expected in the correct direction.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports 6.722 vs 6.259 orders/day across 72 and 293 days and provides a verdict of directionally supported but inconclusive due to weak magnitude and missing variance.
